content: Recent technology news highlights Musk's announcement of X Money launching in April, Microsoft's AI agents, and Google's Gemini AI expanding across Docs, Sheets, and Slides. Additionally, Amdocs discusses autonomous networks with agentic AI and real-time simulation at Mobile World Congress 2026. Alibaba's earnings report shows a profit decrease due to intense food-delivery competition, but the outlook for AI remains bright. China's high-tech manufacturing sector grew by 9.4% in 2025, with EV output surpassing 16 million units.

news_list.title: 科技新闻速递

Alibaba's earnings report shows a profit decrease due to intense food-delivery competition, but the outlook for AI remains bright. China's high-tech manufacturing sector grew by 9.4% in 2025, with EV output surpassing 16 million units.
